Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and accurate product info, keeping messaging relevant and conversion-ready.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a branded daily marketing email with subject line, body copy, and CTAs based on scraped R1 product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates manual copywriting effort and delivers fresh, on-brand email content every day at scale.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated email to targeted R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily campaign deployment to the full contact list with zero manual scheduling or sending effort.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current DFC product lines, friction material specs, and promotional content to inform email generation.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Grounds AI-generated content in real product data, ensuring accuracy and relevance for DFC's audience.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily DFC-branded marketing email including subject line, body, and product-specific CTAs.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Maintains a consistent daily email cadence for DFC without requiring manual copywriting resources.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated DFC email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers targeted daily campaigns to DFC's customer segments automatically, driving engagement and repeat purchases.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls open support tickets from HubSpot including customer messages, ticket category, and contact history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Gives the AI full context on each customer issue instantly, enabling accurate classification and personalized responses.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a tailored reply using product knowledge from the DFC website.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket response drafting time significantly, allowing the support team to review and send replies instead of writing them from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the classification label and drafted reply back to the HubSpot ticket for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all support activity within HubSpot so agents can work in one place, reducing tool-switching and improving response SLAs.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes customer issue data collection without requiring manual exports, ensuring no submissions are missed.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review and trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Transforms raw form data into an accessible, filterable log that helps identify recurring product issues and reduce return rates.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces warm, high-intent customers in real time so the sales team can act on buying signals before the moment passes.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an automated alert to the sales team via Microsoft Teams and email with the customer's activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables immediate sales follow-up on active customers, increasing conversion likelihood and reducing response lag to near zero.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI agent handling inquiries, product questions, and support for R1 Concepts customers.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to deflect high volumes of inbound customer questions and deliver instant 24/7 responses without human intervention.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates prospecting for sublet leads daily, replacing hours of manual research with a continuously refreshed pipeline.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and verifies contact email addresses for the identified local businesses.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach lands in real inboxes, improving deliverability and reducing time spent on manual contact lookups.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs enriched leads into HubSpot and sends a personalized warm intro email pitching the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Creates a trackable outreach pipeline and delivers daily warm intro emails automatically, generating sublet leads without manual effort.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data including spend, impressions, clicks, ACOS, and conversion metrics across R1 and DFC ad accounts.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Consolidates cross-brand ad performance into one data feed, eliminating manual report pulls from Amazon's interface.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget shifts, and keyword suggestions.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers actionable ad optimization insights at scale, helping reduce wasted spend and improve ACOS across both brands.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching specified keywords and pulls channel metadata including subscriber count, niche, and recent content.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Instantly surfaces relevant creators across YouTube at scale, replacing hours of manual search and tab-switching.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Discovers matching Instagram creators by keyword and collects profile data including follower count, engagement signals, and bio details.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery across Instagram simultaneously, building a multi-platform creator pool from a single keyword search.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes aggregated creator profiles from all sources and filters results by relevance, audience fit, and content alignment to the target brand.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Reduces noise in discovery results so teams receive a curated shortlist of high-fit creators rather than raw, unfiltered data.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche relevance, audience size, and brand safety.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Prioritizes the highest-value creators automatically, allowing marketing teams to focus outreach budget on partners most likely to perform.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the qualified creator list and previously learned outreach sequences and prompt templates stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach campaign uses the most current creator data and refined messaging, reducing manual prep time before each campaign.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompt logic to creator-specific data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-converting outreach at scale without manual copywriting, enabling the team to contact hundreds of creators simultaneously.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator's inbox on the defined sequence schedule.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates delivery of personalized outreach at volume, saving hours of manual emailing and ensuring consistent follow-up cadence.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email threads and negotiation outcomes to provide context for AI-learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real past negotiations, improving response quality and alignment with proven deal-closing language.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation responses based on learned conversation history.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps negotiations moving forward without requiring a human to draft every reply, cutting response lag from hours to minutes.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or queues the AI-drafted negotiation reply back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Maintains seamless conversation continuity with creators, accelerating deal closure and improving creator relationship experience.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Pulls the weekly MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matched part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual spreadsheet matching that previously took staff significant time each Monday, ensuring accuracy in load sheet output.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a new HubSpot marketing email draft embedding the generated sales sheet and load sheet for the weekly MHM campaign.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Automates email creation and asset attachment in one step, allowing marketers to review and send without manual email building.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the MHM email draft is ready for review or has been sent.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the sales and marketing team instantly informed each Monday without requiring anyone to check HubSpot manually.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Analyzes new product launch data and generates compelling email copy, subject lines, and monthly recap content tailored to DFC's First to Market positioning.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Removes the copywriting bottleneck for new launches, enabling marketing emails to be drafted within minutes of a product being confirmed.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates the email draft in HubSpot with the AI-generated content and attaches the corresponding sales sheet assets for each new product launch.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers a publish-ready email draft in HubSpot automatically, saving the team manual email setup time per launch and ensuring consistent formatting.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data to populate the marketing highlights reporting slides.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Replaces manual HubSpot data pulls that consumed significant analyst time each month, ensuring slides reflect real-time CRM data.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click rates, and revenue attribution for inclusion in the monthly deck.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS results into the deck automatically, giving leadership a complete channel view without manual data exports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves web traffic, session, conversion, and channel performance data to populate the digital analytics slides in the deck.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automates the most time-intensive data collection step, pulling accurate GA4 metrics directly without manual report exports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics from HubSpot, Attentive, GA4, and Search Console into slides 48–55 of the monthly Marketing Highlights deck.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully populated 8-slide section automatically each month, saving hours of manual slide-building and reducing copy-paste errors.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies R1 Concepts' keyword gaps by comparing current search performance data against competitor ranking opportunities.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints exactly which keywords to target for maximum organic traffic gain, removing guesswork from content strategy.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully written SEO blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured for search intent and Yoast SEO compliance.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, optimized blog content at scale, enabling R1 Concepts to close keyword gaps faster than manual writing allows.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields pre-populated including meta title, description, and focus keyword.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates manual publishing and SEO field entry, allowing content to go live fully optimized without editorial team intervention.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor names, PO numbers, due dates, and outstanding balances for processing.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Captures the full vendor PO landscape automatically, replacing manual ERP report generation that previously required staff intervention.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms the exported PO data and uploads it to HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates vendor follow-up enrollment, ensuring no overdue PO is missed and reducing the manual workload of the procurement team significantly.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts uploaded MHM vehicle part number data and the New Availability Guide directly in the browser, then matches part numbers across both datasets.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives the team an instant, portable matching tool requiring no internet connection or external system access, usable by any team member on demand.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Formats the matched results into a structured DFC load sheet and exports it as a downloadable Excel file from the browser.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Delivers a formatted, ready-to-use load sheet in seconds without requiring any external tools, saving manual Excel formatting time per weekly run.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens the Attentive platform in Chrome, navigates to the previous week's MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as the starting point for the new campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Removes the repetitive manual campaign setup process each week, ensuring consistent formatting while saving the marketing team setup time every Monday.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's MHM vehicle name in the message body and sets the correct scheduled send time before saving.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Delivers a fully configured, ready-to-send weekly SMS campaign automatically, eliminating manual field edits and reducing the risk of sending outdated vehicle information.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product categories, and revenue by account.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides the raw sales intelligence needed for segmentation and targeting, replacing manual data pulls with an automated, always-current data feed.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back groups based on the analyzed sales data and enrolls each segment into the appropriate email automation sequence.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Automates targeted outreach to every customer segment simultaneously, driving reorders and re-engagement without manual list building or campaign setup.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Triggers personalized SMS campaigns to high-priority customer segments identified in the sales analysis, such as lapsed buyers or cross-sell targets.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Reaches customers on a high-engagement channel with timely, relevant offers, increasing conversion rates beyond what email alone can achieve.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen containing the weekly Super Session Saturday download link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking each week, ensuring the automation triggers immediately when new content is ready without human intervention.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a hosted public download URL to replace the previous week's link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures every email contains a live, trackable download link hosted in HubSpot, enabling click analytics and reliable file delivery to subscribers.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistent, on-brand weekly email to the full subscriber list every Saturday without any manual email building, saving 30–60 minutes of marketing work per week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully written B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — based on keyword briefs and content strategy inputs.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready SEO content at scale without a copywriter, compressing blog production from days to minutes and building consistent organic search coverage.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes it to the DFC WordPress site with proper formatting, SEO metadata, and category tagging.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Automatically populates the DFC blog with optimized content, growing indexed pages and driving organic traffic from high-intent B2B search queries.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images, and retrieves vehicle history and specs from Wikipedia and Wikimedia Commons.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research by instantly gathering reference content, visuals, and factual vehicle data needed to produce an accurate, on-brand video package.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the vehicle input and all scraped reference data, then writes a complete Friction Friday-style video script including hook, body, and call-to-action.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a publish-ready, brand-consistent script in seconds, replacing what would otherwise be 1–2 hours of copywriting per episode.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a consistent AI voice profile.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers studio-quality narration without scheduling a recording session, cutting production time by hours per video.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the assembled video package — script, voiceover file, thumbnail asset, and video metadata — via Apps Script webhook and logs everything in a structured row for review.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Centralizes all deliverables in one place so the team can review, approve, and publish without hunting across tools or folders.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows via API and audits enrollment triggers, logic branches, delays, and email sends for gaps and inefficiencies.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Uncovers missed revenue opportunities from broken or underperforming automations, such as contacts falling out of welcome series or site-visit triggers not firing correctly.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Applies optimized workflow configurations — fixing site visit triggers, tightening welcome series timing, and removing redundant branches — directly via the HubSpot API.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Ensures every new R1 lead receives the correct automated nurture sequence from first touch, improving conversion rates and reducing manual sales follow-up.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports DFC customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, and purchase history to be mapped to HubSpot contacts.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates the foundational data bridge between DFC's ERP and CRM, enabling sales automations to be triggered by real transactional customer behavior.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Matches Dream CustomerIDs to existing HubSpot contacts and writes the CustomerID as a custom property, creating a persistent link between both systems.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Unlocks ERP-driven sales workflows in HubSpot, allowing DFC to trigger automations based on order history, reorder cycles, and customer tier without manual data entry.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in the planning stage with connections and workflow steps not yet defined.
Bomb File Project.impact: Scope and business impact will be determined once connections and objectives are finalized.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects a newly published R1 Concepts YouTube video and extracts the title, URL, description, and transcript to seed all downstream content.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Triggers the full weekly content pipeline automatically at publish time, eliminating manual handoffs and ensuring zero-delay cross-channel distribution.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Publishes a fully formatted SEO blog post derived from the video transcript, with embedded video, optimized metadata, and structured content for search indexing.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Converts every R1 video into a searchable web asset, compounding organic traffic over time and capturing high-intent automotive enthusiast queries.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Generates and sends a weekly email to R1's HubSpot subscriber list featuring the new video, blog post link, and a compelling subject line derived from the video content.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Consistently re-engages R1's customer and prospect base with relevant content each week, driving repeat site visits and keeping the brand top-of-mind.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends a concise SMS to R1's opted-in mobile list with a direct link to the new video and a short engaging hook.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Drives immediate video traffic from mobile subscribers with near-100% open rates, amplifying weekly content reach beyond email and organic search.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Posts a completion summary to the R1 Teams channel confirming that the blog, email, and SMS have all been successfully published and sent.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Provides instant team-wide visibility into weekly automation completion without requiring anyone to log into multiple platforms to verify.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, click-through rates, and indexed page counts for all DFC blog URLs.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides ground-truth SEO performance data showing exactly which blog posts are gaining search visibility and driving qualified organic traffic.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves weekly session counts, traffic sources, bounce rates, and goal completions for DFC blog pages to measure business impact.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Connects SEO activity to actual website behavior, showing whether blog traffic is converting into leads or product page visits.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls the list of published blog posts, publication dates, word counts, and categories to track content volume and publishing cadence.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Enables efficiency reporting by correlating content output rate with traffic and ranking growth, proving agent productivity.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Extracts on-page SEO scores, readability grades, and metadata completeness for each published DFC blog post.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Surfaces content quality gaps and ensures every post meets SEO best practices before compiling the weekly reporting dashboard.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword rankings, impressions, CTR, and index coverage data for all R1 Concepts blog URLs.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Quantifies the SEO value delivered by the blog agent each month, making it easy to report organic growth and keyword position improvements to stakeholders.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly organic traffic sessions, user behavior metrics, and conversion events attributed to R1 blog content.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Ties blog performance directly to business outcomes like product page visits and lead form completions, demonstrating clear ROI from automated content.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Exports a monthly content inventory of all R1 blog posts including publish dates, categories, and word counts to track publishing volume and consistency.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides a clear record of content output for monthly reporting, making it simple to measure agent efficiency and content cadence over time.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments and triggers the processing pipeline when a new invoice is detected.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Eliminates manual inbox monitoring and invoice sorting, ensuring every vendor invoice is captured and processed immediately upon arrival.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Orchestrates the full processing workflow — passing the PDF to PDF tools, applying the Harbor Tires stamp and Richard's signature at the correct coordinates, and outputting the finalized document.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Processes each invoice in seconds rather than minutes, eliminating manual stamping and signing while ensuring every document is consistently formatted and legally complete.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Applies the Harbor Tires stamp image and Richard's signature to the correct position on each vendor invoice PDF and saves the finalized, signed document.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Produces legally stamped and signed invoice documents at scale, removing a repetitive manual task and ensuring no invoice is accidentally missed or incorrectly signed.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Sends the completed stamped-and-signed invoice PDF back to the appropriate recipient or saves it to the designated folder for records and vendor confirmation.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Closes the loop on the invoice workflow automatically, ensuring vendors receive processed documents promptly and Harbor Tires maintains a clean audit trail.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are visited and feeds URL-level visit data into the workflow trigger system.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Enables intent-based targeting by identifying exactly which product or category pages a prospect viewed, allowing highly relevant follow-up emails.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Fires one of 6 Phase 1 workflow triggers based on the specific page visited, enrolling the prospect into the matching email sequence.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Delivers contextually relevant outreach automatically within minutes of a site visit, increasing conversion likelihood while eliminating manual follow-up effort.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support requests and queues them for AI classification and response.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all inbound support volume into a single automated pipeline, reducing manual triage time and ensuring no ticket is missed.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Classifies the ticket by issue category, determines urgency, and drafts an appropriate resolution or escalation response.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Cuts average ticket response time dramatically and ensures consistent, accurate replies across all support volume without requiring agent intervention on routine issues.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Updates the ticket record with the AI classification, routes it to the correct queue or agent, and sends the drafted response to the customer.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Ensures every ticket is logged, routed, and responded to consistently, improving customer satisfaction scores and freeing agents to focus on complex cases.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young drops the monthly new arrivals file into Teams, triggering the automation to begin processing.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Eliminates manual coordination between the content creator and marketing ops by using a single file drop as the workflow start signal.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives and uploads the new arrivals data, making product details available for email and SMS content population.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Ensures marketing content references live, accurate product data from the source of truth rather than manually entered copy.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG email template and populates it with the new arrival product data for the current month.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Saves hours of manual email build time each month by auto-generating a ready-to-review campaign from an approved template.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the NAG SMS template and populates it with new arrival highlights for the monthly text broadcast.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Keeps SMS outreach in sync with email without requiring a separate manual build, ensuring consistent multi-channel messaging.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers as new contacts, then sends templated RFQ outreach emails automatically.
Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Scales carrier prospecting without manual outreach effort, ensuring a consistent pipeline of new carrier candidates is always being worked.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Evaluates carrier responses against cost and lead time thresholds, auto-qualifying those within 5% of current carrier benchmarks.
Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Removes manual bid review from the process, surfacing only viable carrier candidates and accelerating the time-to-decision on new shipping partners.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance metrics from all three paid channels into a unified data payload.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Consolidates multi-platform ad data in seconds, eliminating the 30–60 minutes typically spent manually exporting from each platform.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares current week metrics against the prior month's daily average and generates a plain-English performance summary with notable variances flagged.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Transforms raw numbers into actionable insight instantly, allowing the team to spot issues or wins without digging through spreadsheets.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly checkup report to the relevant team members every week on schedule.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Ensures stakeholders receive a consistent, timely performance pulse every week without any manual preparation required.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts full-month performance data across all paid channels at month end.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Aggregates a complete month of cross-platform data in one pull, replacing hours of manual exports and formatting.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Structures the data into slide-ready formatted summaries, narratives, and takeaways aligned to the end-of-month report template.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Produces a presentation-ready report draft in minutes rather than hours, letting the team focus on strategy rather than formatting.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the formatted monthly report to stakeholders with the content ready to paste into end-of-month slides.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Ensures the report lands in stakeholders' inboxes on time every month with zero manual assembly required.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration and tags them for audience export.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Automatically identifies high-intent customers who engaged with the product post-purchase, creating a valuable retargeting seed audience.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Validates and normalizes contact data to ensure it meets Meta's custom audience matching requirements before upload.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Maximizes audience match rates by cleaning and formatting data correctly, improving the effectiveness of downstream Meta campaigns.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Adds the validated contacts to the designated Meta custom audience for retargeting or lookalike expansion.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Grows a high-quality first-party audience automatically with every warranty submission, improving ad targeting without any manual list uploads.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls all active ad creative copy and corresponding performance metrics from Meta and TikTok ad accounts.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces the full landscape of live ad copy and its performance data instantly, replacing manual account crawling.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Identifies underperforming ads based on performance thresholds and generates specific copy improvement recommendations for each.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Delivers prioritized, actionable copy recommendations without requiring a manual creative audit, accelerating the optimization cycle.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends the audit results and copy recommendations to the paid social team for review and implementation.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Puts clear, prioritized recommendations directly in the team's inbox, reducing the time from insight to action on underperforming creatives.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors project tasks, due dates, and status changes across assigned boards and surfaces items requiring attention.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps the team aware of project health without requiring manual status checks across multiple Asana boards.

Asana Agent.action: Analyzes task status, identifies blockers or overdue items, and drafts a prioritized summary with recommended actions.
Asana Agent.impact: Converts raw task data into a clear, prioritized action list, helping the team focus on what matters most each week.

Asana Agent.action: Sends the Asana task summary and recommendations to relevant team members or project owners.
Asana Agent.impact: Ensures accountability by delivering a clear to-do digest directly to responsible parties without requiring them to log into Asana.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or meeting notes from the weekly media meeting as raw input for processing.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Ensures no action items or decisions from the meeting are lost by immediately feeding discussion content into the automation pipeline.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Forwards the captured meeting notes or transcript to Claude for structured task extraction.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Creates a reliable handoff point between the meeting record and the AI processing layer without requiring manual copy-paste.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Reads the meeting notes and extracts discrete action items, assigns owners based on context, and formats them as structured tasks.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Turns unstructured meeting discussion into clean, assignable tasks in seconds, eliminating the manual note-to-task translation step after every meeting.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates the extracted tasks in the appropriate Asana project boards with owners, due dates, and context notes populated.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Guarantees every action item from the media meeting lives in Asana and is assigned within minutes of the meeting ending, improving follow-through and accountability.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls all active search ad copy along with performance metrics — CTR, conversion rate, impressions, and quality score — for ads flagged as underperforming.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces the exact ads dragging down campaign performance, giving the team a prioritized list to act on rather than manually reviewing every ad.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Analyzes the underperforming ad copy against performance data and generates specific, prioritized rewrite recommendations with reasoning for each suggestion.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Replaces hours of manual copy review with structured, actionable recommendations that directly link creative changes to expected performance gains.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Sends a formatted audit report email to the marketing team listing each underperforming ad, what's wrong, and the recommended replacement copy.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act report directly to the right people, eliminating the need to log into Google Ads or interpret raw data.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the raw Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent entries, status fields, connection details, and progress notes logged for the week.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Captures the full state of all active agents in one pull, ensuring nothing is missed in the weekly summary.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Transforms the raw sheet data into a clean, human-readable weekly update — grouping agents by status, surfacing blockers, and highlighting what's new or changed.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Turns a cluttered spreadsheet into a polished briefing document in seconds, saving whoever compiles the update 30–60 minutes of formatting work each week.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly agent update to the relevant stakeholders as a clean, readable email digest.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Keeps the whole team aligned on automation progress without requiring anyone to open or interpret the raw sheet.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle spec — make, model, year, and relevant attributes — through a HubSpot form, triggering the workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Standardizes how requests are submitted so the system always receives clean, structured input without back-and-forth clarification.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream ERP system using the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve all matching parts DFC currently stocks and identifies gaps in coverage.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls live inventory data in seconds, replacing what would otherwise require a manual catalog search across thousands of SKUs.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Organizes the Dream inventory results into a structured, clearly formatted catalog layout — separating stocked items from missing coverage and adding relevant part details.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a polished, presentation-ready catalog structure without manual formatting, saving Mark significant prep time per request.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark a formatted Excel file showing all DFC parts available for the requested vehicle alongside a clear list of inventory gaps.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the complete catalog to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, enabling faster customer quotes and special market conversations.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report — including on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit shipments.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing individual manual lookups with a single automated pull, reclaiming hours of repetitive research every week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each row of the backorder report with the live Dream inventory data and flags any parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a fully enriched, decision-ready report that clearly shows which orders can be fulfilled and which are stuck.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backorder updates — pre-written based on each part's status — ready for review and send.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time needed to communicate with customers about backorders from hours of manual drafting to a quick review-and-send workflow.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all listed two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Replaces days of manual catalog research with an automated pull across three competitor sources, creating a comprehensive market fitment map instantly.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify overlaps, gaps, and potential new SKU opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a clear picture of where DFC has coverage versus where competitors have fitments DFC doesn't — enabling faster, data-backed product decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers asking them to confirm demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments not currently in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Passively collects real demand signals from customers without manual outreach, validating which gaps are worth filling before committing to new inventory.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles the full cross-referenced catalog, gap analysis, and incoming customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino to review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, organized reference document that consolidates competitor data, DFC coverage, and customer demand — ready for product planning decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, descriptions, and primary text — across every running campaign for scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly surfaces the full universe of live ad copy without requiring anyone to manually open and read individual ads across campaigns.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of pulled ad copy for specified target phrases and flags each match with the exact ad, field name, and verbatim copy where it appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across all active ads in seconds, eliminating the risk of missing a match during a manual audit.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a structured report listing every flagged ad with the platform, campaign name, field, and exact copy where each target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a complete, evidence-backed audit directly to the requester so they can act on findings immediately without logging into ad platforms.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Pulls live campaign data from Meta and TikTok — including performance metrics, ad copy, audience details, and spend — to serve as the chatbot's knowledge base.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives the chatbot real-time visibility into paid channel performance so users can ask questions and get accurate, current answers without pulling reports manually.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Interprets user questions about paid channel performance and responds with data-grounded answers, summaries, or recommendations drawn from the live Meta and TikTok data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Enables any team member to get instant, accurate paid media insights through natural conversation — no analyst or platform login required.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the candidate's name, email, resume attachment, and the role they applied for.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates manual inbox triage by automatically capturing every inbound application the moment it arrives, ensuring no candidate is missed.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured Drive folder organized by role and date, creating a permanent, searchable archive of all applicants.
Resume Bot.impact: Keeps every resume stored and organized automatically, making it easy to retrieve past candidates without digging through an email inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume, scores the candidate against the requirements of the relevant open role, and assigns a decision: advance, deny, or flag as pending due to a paused role.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of manual resume screening with consistent, criteria-based scoring that surfaces the best candidates and routes edge cases appropriately.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant with their score, decision, role, and resume link to a dashboard — with denied and advanced candidates in the main tab and paused-role candidates in a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives hiring managers a live, organized view of the entire applicant pipeline without manually tracking anyone, and surfaces paused candidates automatically when roles reopen.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents across the team — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 in planned stages. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages since the last update. While it was a quieter week on the scoreboard, the existing completed agents continue to run and deliver value daily, weekly, and monthly across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, SEO, and operations. Great work to everyone keeping the momentum going — with 17 agents still in the planned queue, there's plenty of exciting work on the horizon!
